creator: gwright@antiope.com
text:
Thank you, Matthias, for noting this in the documentation. I didn't have a problem until this morning when I started several CI jobs at once.

Some more info (perhaps it helps in the future): my GitLab server is running in a jail on a server with eleven other jails. I also have "queue_requests false" in config/puma.rb, which seems to be the default.  I also have "threads 1,16"; could this have been too many for the number of workers?  I don't have a mental picture of how threads and workers are related.
